overall.description: Game engine footage from GTA V showing a first-person perspective walking along the shoulder of a highway into a large concrete tunnel. The scene transitions from bright midday sunlight at the entrance to dim artificial lighting inside, with various vehicles including cars, trucks, and buses passing by in both directions.

red semi-truck enters the tunnel portal
black classic car enters the tunnel followed by silver SUV

red semi-truck entering the tunnel portal

entered.detail: large concrete tunnel entrance archway cutting through the hillside
metal guardrail running along the left side of the road
steep hillside with dry yellow grass and sparse vegetation

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a large highway tunnel entrance on a bright sunny day. The concrete archway of the tunnel portal dominates the center view, while a metal guardrail runs along the left shoulder. Various vehicles including a Cluckin' Bell truck and several cars enter and exit the tunnel as the camera walks forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: tunnel entrance threshold with overhead signals

events.description: camera crosses from bright sunlight into the artificially lit tunnel interior
transition from open highway to enclosed concrete tunnel space

entered.detail: smooth grey concrete walls of the tunnel interior
rows of yellow fluorescent lights mounted on the tunnel ceiling
overhead traffic signals with X and arrow indicators above the tunnel entrance
bright white light visible at the distant tunnel exit

segments.scene_description: The camera crosses the threshold into the tunnel, transitioning from bright daylight to dim artificial lighting. Overhead traffic signals and rows of ceiling lights become visible, while the concrete walls enclose the space. The tunnel exit appears as a bright spot in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete tunnel interior with chevron wall markings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the tunnel interior alongside moderate traffic flow

white box truck with red logo passing by

metal ventilation grates embedded in the left tunnel wall

segments.scene_description: Deep inside the tunnel, the camera continues walking along the left shoulder. The concrete walls are marked with yellow and black chevron stripes on the right, while overhead lights illuminate the passing traffic including trucks, buses, and cars. Ventilation grates appear periodically on the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: deeper tunnel section approaching distant exit

blue pickup truck passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: continuing through the tunnel toward the bright exit light visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera continues its steady progression through the tunnel interior. The concrete walls, overhead lighting, and chevron markings remain consistent while various vehicles including sports cars and trucks continue to pass by. The bright light of the tunnel exit remains visible in the far distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person progression from a bright, sunlit highway shoulder into the dim, enclosed environment of a massive concrete tunnel. It begins by approaching the towering concrete archway of the tunnel portal, moving past a metal guardrail as cars and a Cluckin' Bell truck flow in and out of the entrance. As the camera crosses the threshold, the brilliant daylight abruptly shifts to artificial illumination, revealing rows of ceiling lights and overhead traffic signals against the enclosing concrete walls. The scene then deepens into the tunnel interior, where the camera passes ventilation grates and yellow-and-black chevron stripes while buses and sports cars streak past. This steady forward motion continues through the artificial glow of the tunnel, keeping the distant, bright light of the exit centered in the frame.
